title: Fix check for bad std::regex
body:
Fixes #2606

I tested it with GCC 4.8.5, GCC 7.3.1 and Clang 3.4.2 on CentOS 7. All three produce a binary with a working ``logger -expect`` command. I tested each with these yosys commands:
```
logger -expect error "syntax error, unexpected TOK_CONSTVAL" 1
read_verilog <<EOT
module inverter(input a, output y);
assign y = (a == 1'b0? 1'b1 : 1'b0);
endmodule // inverter
EOT
```
Yosys terminates with exit code 0. And then again with a non-matching string for the ``logger`` command: Yosys terminates with exit code 1.
